title: The Mischievous Prankster Portrait
promptText: Generate a Pixar-style character portrait of a mischievous young boy with spiky hair, raised eyebrows, and a cheeky grin, caught mid-laugh. He's wearing a striped t-shirt, has a slingshot tucked into his back pocket, and one eyebrow slightly raised. Use vibrant, playful colors with soft cartoon lighting and a blurred park or suburban neighborhood in the background. Add a slight fisheye lens effect for a fun, exaggerated perspective. Render in 4K with rich Pixar-style shading and textures.
